title: War Machines
description: War Machines is a mod that aims to add semi-realistic firearms and other weaponry from all ages of history into Minecraft! Currently most features of this mod are experimental, so issues and bugs are to be expected!
body:
### **📖 About**
War Machines is a mod that aims to add semi-realistic firearms and other weaponry from all ages of history into Minecraft! Currently most features of this mod are experimental,

so issues and bugs are to be expected. More content will be added over time, as well as some new features!

 

### **📦 Required dependencies**

[Geckolib](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/geckolib) 4.2.4+
 

### **➕ Contribute**

Have any suggestions, models or assets you would like to contribute? Check out our discord! 

 

### **👋 Join our community**

Join our discord community to receive sneak peaks, update notifications and more!

[War Machines Official Discord](https://discord.gg/C6k8kw3yEu)
